title: Repair feedback dataset handoff for model frontier
description:
Purpose: model frontier runs must evaluate score versions against feedback-derived labeled samples even when the score YAML has no persistent data section.

Definition of Done:
- Feedback-backed evaluation receives explicit labeled samples instead of depending on AccuracyEvaluation fallback YAML data loading.
- TactusScore frontier runs do not fail with generic Dataset not found when feedback items exist.
- Behavior is covered by Gherkin and executable tests.
- Existing LangGraphScore and direct accuracy evaluation behavior remains unchanged.
